name: sdd-protocol
description: Spec-Driven Development — an agent orchestration protocol that treats specifications as executable governance for Claude Code.

plugins.name: sdd
plugins.description: Strict SDD pipeline: spec → architecture → backlog → parallel execution → GO/NO-GO quality gate. Split into /sdd-plan (Opus) + /sdd-execute (Sonnet) for automatic per-phase model routing. 4 commands + 10 expert skills. Engram semantic memory is optional.
